title: Travel Anchors
body:
# Travel Anchors

This Mod brings Travel Anchors from EnderIO into a standalone mod.

It currently features a Travel Anchor, Travel Staff and two new Enchantments.

The **Travel Staff** allows the Player to teleport by using `Shift`+`Right click` and aiming at the desired location. Aim the staff at a travel anchor to teleport onto it.

The **Travel Anchor** is a block that allows for teleportation over greater distances when you stand on it, even through obstacles as long as the anchor can be selected. You can rightclick the Travel Anchor with any block in your offhand to change its appearence and model. You can also name the TravelAnchor whatever you want.

The mod adds two new enchantments:

**Teleportation:** Allows you to Teleport like with a Travel Staff.

**Range I - III:** Increases the maximum range you can teleport.
